diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the session store, DTO mirrors, shadcn component entry points, the page composition, and CSS theme; the .svelte components are display-only.

findings.evidence: The UI talks to the core only through invoke()/listen() against the existing command boundary; conversations and messages are derived from the live zalo://message stream and real send_message responses — no mock/sample data. No credential values are referenced in the frontend.
findings.fix: Keep deriving UI state from IPC; when persistence lands, hydrate from the store layer rather than embedding fixtures.

findings.evidence: bits-ui (shadcn-svelte runtime dep) added to devDependencies; Playwright installed locally for verify-ui but intentionally not added to the manifest (browser tooling, not an app dep).
findings.fix: Run bun install on a bun-equipped machine to refresh bun.lock for bits-ui; document Playwright as an optional dev tool.

summary: chat-ui-redesign is a frontend-only Zalo-style 3-pane layout built with shadcn-svelte and wired entirely to the existing IPC commands + zalo://message stream (no mock data, no credentials in the webview). Type-check 0/0, production build passes, and real browser validation (verify-ui golden path) passed with a screenshot. Secondary nav/icons are acknowledged visual placeholders. Safe to mark done.
